positive: Minimalist forest spirit silhouette, standing amidst stylized woodland flora and glowing bioluminescent mushrooms. The spirit should be a flowing, ethereal humanoid figure with gentle, curved lines, integrated with natural elements like trailing ivy and delicate branches. Composition must be centered and highly symmetrical, featuring high contrast black silhouettes against a vibrant, stylized gradient background of deep teal, emerald green, and soft violet. Lighting is dramatic, coming from below the flora, creating strong, defined edges and a sense of magic. Perfect for screen printing on apparel, with clean lines and scalable elements. Style: Modern folk art meets Art Nouveau, vector illustration quality.
negative: photorealistic, text, letters, logo, watermark, cropped, low detail, messy, blurry, fuzzy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, gradient artifacts, signature, realistic sky, abstract lines, monochrome, grayscale
